## Problem Statement

What user, workflow, or developer problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Workflow Or API Expectations

If relevant, describe the expected workflow, API shape, or user-facing behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, links, or examples here.
